div.head: 324. Editorial Note
div.p: On November 6, 1963, Secretary-General U Thant proposed that Felix Schnyder’s term of office as High Commissioner for Refugees be extended for 2 years, from January 1, 1964, to December 31, 1965. On November 27 the General Assembly decided, by acclamation, to extend Schnyder’s term. (National Archives and Records Administration, RG 59, Central Files 1960–63, REF 3 UN, and Yearbook of the United Nations, 1963, page 367)
